title: Revert "Bump github.com/urfave/cli from 1.22.1 to 1.22.4"
body:
This reverts commit 8c8d9bd23f9ddd5f183391f2751927cd392794d0.

When correctly vendored, this breaks tests.

comments.body: @mtrmac Lets get @QiWang19 Patch to remove urfave/cli and move to cobra rather then struggling with this.

> @mtrmac Lets get @QiWang19 Patch to remove urfave/cli and move to cobra rather then struggling with this.

Yes, that’s why I’ve not looked into the test failure yet.
Tests passed in Travis, but it’s not yet visible in GitHub; merging anyway.
